title: Kagurabachi Craft
description: Kagurabachi manga style, vibes and combats into Minecraft!
body:
# Kagurabachi Craft
![aura farming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53589d8e9bbcf057bb2f6e85ab3158538dba1dab.png)

**Kagurabachi Craft** is a comprehensive combat and magic overhaul mod that transforms the gameplay of Minecraft, drawing inspiration from the dark and dynamic world of the *Kagurabachi* manga. Leave vanilla combat behind and prepare for a world where victory is decided by skill, not just gear.

This mod converts the game into a skill-based action experience, introducing a deep Sorcery system based on the legendary Enchanted Blades. Master new fighting styles, awaken your latent Spiritual Energy, and choose your path in a world where powerful sorcerers and deadly blades clash.

## Core Features

*   **Dynamic Combat System:** Forget spam-clicking. Experience combo attacks, dodges with invincibility frames, perfect parries, and unique maneuvers like ripostes from a sheathed stance and tactical backstabs.
* 
  ![combat hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8f6bda23c70f73d1a37dd90c657256dd1bea802.png)
  
*   **Deep Sorcery System:** Unlock one of several unique Sorcery types, each with its own set of 6 active abilities. 
* 
  ![sorcery hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a377303127226686681be152121b3dd1cdc87bc9.png)
  
*   **Legendary Enchanted Blades:** Find one of the seven legendary blades to forge a contract with it, unlocking its devastating power and namesake Sorcery.
* 
  ![sheathed blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b720d78314795a5c903cc2a5accc0654bc92c74d.png)
  
*   **Styles:** Perform spectacular and efficient actions in combat to build up your Style Gauge. Upon reaching S-Rank, you can unleash an ultimate attack that changes the tide of battle.

 ![style gauge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b5b156e90192e8b7136eb5e5f17b5883c34e6b3.png)
*
*   **Cinematic PvP Clashes:** When two players use an ultimate Style simultaneously, they will enter a "Style Clash"—a tense, QTE-driven duel that determines whose will is stronger.
  
  ![Iai White Purity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbd6bc16cc90d3c7405c855984644472cf3334d9.png)

## Current Features

As of now, the mod includes all core mechanics, featuring:

*   **5 Sorcery Types:**
    *   **Enten** 
    *   **Tobimune** 
    *   **Flame Bone** 
    *   **Shiba Teleportation** 
    *   **Isou** 

*   **2 Ultimate Styles:**
    *   **Iai: White Purity:** A lightning-fast dash that cuts through all enemies in its path.
    *   **Cigarrete Cross Slash:** A tactical strike involving a teleport to the target for a devastating cross-slash.

![smoking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63e0fe94ea4101e850eacf8b4a0c3d7530ccadd0.png)


*   **2 Legendary Blades:** Enten and Tobimune.
  
![tobimune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe12e71e398ae45ca6b85dea449a8a2a795d71c9.png)
  
![Enten](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c665d8f4927d254b6f2b9ca7329425746aec1830.png)

## Resources & Community

Join our community to stay up-to-date with development, share your experiences, and find others to battle with.

*   **Complete Mod Wiki:** [**Kagurabachi Craft Wiki**](https://saltyfrappuccino.github.io/Kagurabachi-Craft-Wiki/)
*   **Official Discord Server:** [**Join the Discord**](https://discord.gg/smkCPEEFqd)

## Installation & Dependencies

For the mod to function correctly, the following dependencies are **REQUIRED**.

### Required Dependencies:

1.  **[Kleiders Custom Renderer API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kleiders-custom-renderer-api/files/5675429)**
    *   *Necessary for all custom renders, animations, and visual effects to work.*
2.  **[Player Animator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator/files/4587214)**
    *   *Handles all new player animations, including stances, attacks, dodges, and ability usage.*

### Recommended Mods:

1.  **[The Lost Cities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-lost-cities/files/6892035)**
    *   We highly recommend using this mod for world generation. Most of the gameplay mechanics and PvP encounters were tested in the abandoned cities it creates. These locations are ideal for dynamic combat, offering plenty of cover, verticality, and a unique atmosphere that perfectly complements our mod.
